title: New- Ketra D2 and Rania D2 Architectural Downlights
bodyHtml:
Lutron Unveils Ketra D2 and Rania D2 Architectural Downlights in Palm Desert

Introduction

Lutron Electronics has introduced the Ketra D2 and Rania D2 architectural downlights, expanding their already impressive lineup of luxury lighting solutions. While not breakthrough technology, these new additions offer the same high quality and reliability that customers have come to expect from Ketra. As partners with Ketra, AVIR is excited to showcase these new products in their newly renovated showroom in Palm Desert, CA.

‍

‍

Ketra D2: Small Size, Big Impact

The Ketra D2 downlight is a natural extension of Lutron’s existing offerings. Designed to provide dynamic lighting that adapts throughout the day, the 2-inch aperture downlight combines advanced engineering with a minimalist design. This makes it the smallest and most flexible downlight from Ketra to date.

‍

Key Features of the Ketra D2

• Minimalist 2-inch aperture for subtle integration

• Multiple trims and color options for aesthetic versatility

• Ultra-slim housings to maximize ceiling heights

• Precise manufacturing with an intuitive hot aiming system

• Wireless control platform for easy installation and adaptability

• Price: $850 (fixed beam) and $950 (adjustable beam)

‍

‍

Rania D2: Redefining White Light

The Rania D2 downlight introduces a new light engine that offers a broad range of white light, from the warmth of incandescent to the brightness of midday sun. This fixture continues Lutron’s tradition of providing exceptional lighting solutions that enhance the home environment.

‍

Key Features of the Rania D2

• Exceptional white light quality from a three-channel emitter

• Broad white light spectrum for versatile lighting needs

• Same slim housings and refined hot aiming system as the Ketra D2

• Wireless control for convenience and adaptability

• Price: $625 (fixed beam) and $725 (adjustable beam)

‍

‍

Seamless Integration with Lutron Systems

Both the Ketra D2 and Rania D2 downlights are designed to work seamlessly with Lutron’s premium lighting controls and shades. This integration allows for the creation of personalized spaces with high-quality, dynamic lighting. The fixtures are wirelessly controlled, reducing the need for extensive panel space and making installation easier and more cost-effective.

‍

AVIR: Bringing Luxury Lighting to the Coachella Valley

Are you looking for luxury lighting in the Coachella Valley?

As a proud partner of Ketra, AVIR is thrilled to offer these new products to their customers. With the newly renovated showroom, AVIR brings a taste of the finest lighting solutions to affluent homeowners in Palm Desert and the surrounding areas. The showroom features a highly curated selection of products, ensuring that clients experience the best in luxury lighting.

‍

Availability

When will the Ketra D2 and Rania D2 be available? The Ketra D2 and Rania D2 downlights are now available for pre-order, with shipments beginning in September.

‍

‍

FAQs about Lutron’s Ketra D2 and Rania D2 Downlights

‍

Q: What are the key features of the Ketra D2 downlight?

A: The Ketra D2 features a 2-inch aperture, multiple trims and color options, ultra-slim housings, an intuitive hot aiming system, and wireless control. Prices are $850 for the fixed beam and $950 for the adjustable beam.

Q: How does the Rania D2 downlight enhance white light?

A: The Rania D2 offers exceptional white light quality from a three-channel emitter, a broad white light spectrum, slim housings, a refined hot aiming system, and wireless control. Prices are $625 for the fixed beam and $725 for the adjustable beam.

Q: Can these downlights be integrated with Lutron systems?

A: Yes, both the Ketra D2 and Rania D2 downlights seamlessly integrate with Lutron’s premium lighting controls and shades, offering personalized and dynamic lighting solutions.

‍

Why choose Lutron’s new downlights?

Lutron’s Ketra D2 and Rania D2 downlights are a testament to the brand’s commitment to quality and innovation. These new products, available through AVIR, offer homeowners greater flexibility, superior light quality, and seamless integration with Lutron’s premium controls. As the market continues to shift towards discreet recessed fixtures and reliable lighting performance, the D2 series stands out as a versatile and advanced option.
